response.justification: Bogdan is a highly accomplished engineer with exceptional depth in architecture, testing, and mentoring, exceeding the seniority bar significantly. However, he presents notable gaps: his C++ experience is 20+ years old (last role 2000–2001), with 15+ years focused on web/Node.js stacks; his entire domain experience is in web, GIS, and media—not industrial automation, IoT, or manufacturing; and there is no evidence of SDL or IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity expertise, both core to the role. While his fundamentals are strong enough to potentially ramp up on C++ and the domain, this is a specialized position where domain expertise and recent language competency matter significantly. An interview could assess his genuine interest in and capacity to transition.
strengths: Exceptional career breadth and depth across embedded systems, desktop, mobile, and web development with proven staff-level architectural design capabilities

Demonstrated expertise in high-performance, scalable systems (microservices handling millions of requests/sec, event-driven platforms) and strong mentoring track record through courses, dojos, and team leadership

Deep commitment to testing-driven development, code quality, and technical documentation evidenced by creating libraries (Fluent-Asserts), test runners (Trial), and teaching systematic approaches to engineering
concerns: C++ experience is 20+ years old (last substantial role: National Instruments 2000–2001); recent 15+ years of career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and D—now at risk of skill atrophy in the core language required for this role

Career trajectory is entirely in web platforms, media, finance, and GIS—zero documented experience in industrial automation, IoT manufacturing, distributed industrial systems, or domain-specific protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, IEC 104, OPC UA)
No evidence of Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) implementation or IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards knowledge, despite these being core competencies explicitly required for the role
